close_reason: Removed 7 unused Config fields: scan_interval_ms, max_time_per_queue_ms, item_lease_duration_ms, queue_lease_duration_ms, max_retries, backoff_fn, telemetry_prefix
description:
Config.ex defines 7 fields that are never used:
- scan_interval_ms
- max_time_per_queue_ms
- item_lease_duration_ms
- queue_lease_duration_ms
- max_retries
- backoff_fn (bug - should be used)
- telemetry_prefix

Fix: Remove unused fields or implement the features they configure.
title: Remove unused Config fields
